summary: Retested both iteration_1 issues plus regression. Backend pytest 8/8 PASS (root, leads CRUD, validation, WhatsApp sanitisation, sort). Frontend: (1) HIGH FIXED - mobile sticky age [data-testid='timeline-sticky-age'] on 390x844 now correctly progresses through all 6 stages (0 – 12 Bulan -> 1 – 2 Tahun -> 2 – 3 Tahun -> 3 – 4 Tahun -> 4 – 5 Tahun -> 5 – 6 Tahun) as the user scrolls (scroll listener picking nearest-to-viewport-center stage works correctly). (2) LOW FIXED - contact form has noValidate attribute; submitting with empty fields shows the sonner toast 'Mohon lengkapi nama, nomor WhatsApp, dan kebutuhan Anda.' with no native browser popup. (3) Regression - valid form submit posts to /api/leads and shows 'Terima kasih! Tim YAMET akan menghubungi Anda segera.' success toast, button transitions to 'Pesan Terkirim'. No console/page errors observed. Backend logger initialised at line 31 (before routes) - verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Both prior issues are correctly addressed: Timeline.jsx (lines 151-190) now uses a rAF-throttled scroll listener choosing the stage whose center is closest to viewport center; this is robust to tall mobile cards. Contact.jsx form has noValidate, JS-side empty-field check fires toast.error in Bahasa before any axios call.
server.py logger declared before routes (line 31) - NameError risk in create_lead's except branch resolved.
Minor (carryover, non-blocking): /api/leads has no auth and is publicly readable - acceptable for MVP, flag for production.
seed_data_creation: 1 additional TEST_-prefixed lead created during regression: TEST_Bunda Retest (whatsapp 081299887766). Combined with iteration_1, MongoDB now contains ~4 TEST_ leads. No DELETE endpoint to clean up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both reported bugs from iteration_1 are now fixed and verified. Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_leads_api.py is green (8/8). UI flows verified on 390x844 (mobile sticky-age) and 1280x900 (contact form). If future changes touch Timeline.jsx scroll listener or Contact.jsx validation, re-run the playwright script in iteration_2 thoughts.
rca of the issue: Iteration_1 HIGH bug RCA recap: previous IntersectionObserver with rootMargin '-30% 0px -40% 0px' + intersectionRatio>0.25 never fired on tall mobile cards. Fix applied in Timeline.jsx replaces it with a scroll-event listener (rAF-throttled) that picks the stage whose vertical center is closest to viewport center - this works regardless of stage element height. Verified by scrolling window.scrollBy(0,400) x40 on 390x844 viewport and observing strictly monotonic progression through all 6 ageLabel values.
